text.tspan: The same referral, treatment course, and follow-up timeline —
now supported by Path Compass's mobile app, giving Nia real
choice, privacy, and visibility into her own progress at every
Feel safe enough to eventually share her story
Understand what happens to her private information
See her own progress, not just be assessed
Sees her own growth in real
A door stays open if she
Solid curve = ideal, resolved state · Phase 4 dip preserved intentionally — trauma work stays hard even with good support
